caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary. The screen is divided into two main sections: on the left, there is an image of a man wearing traditional attire, possibly a political figure, with his hand raised as if addressing a crowd. On the right, there is a graphic indicating that Olusola Oyekanmi, a political analyst from Lagos, is speaking on the phone. The headline at the bottom reads "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu," suggesting that the discussion revolves around Bola Tinubu's political stance or campaign. The overall layout and design indicate a professional news broadcast, with social media icons and a call to follow PlusTV Africa at the bottom of the screen.
